svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="五表JOIN" id="rb2"> <mxGraphModel dx="-464" dy="-124" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="900" pageHeight="380" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="t1" parent="1" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;boundedLbl=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="tenant_subject_membership
用户成员身份
(tenantId, realm, scope, userId)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="180" x="30" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t2" parent="1" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;boundedLbl=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="tenant_membership_role
成员-角色关联" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="160" x="260" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t3" parent="1" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;boundedLbl=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="tenant_realm_role
角色定义
(realm 隔离, status)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="160" x="470" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t4" parent="1" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;boundedLbl=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="tenant_realm_role_perm
角色-权限点关联" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="160" x="680" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t5" parent="1" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;boundedLbl=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="rbac_perm_catalog
权限点目录
(perm_key, status)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="160" x="680" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="t1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;endArrow=block;" target="t2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="t2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;endArrow=block;" target="t3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="t3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;endArrow=block;" target="t4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="t4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;endArrow=block;" target="t5"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="out" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="结果：用户拥有的 perm_key 集合" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="280" x="250" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e5" edge="1" parent="1" source="t5" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#2563eb;endArrow=block;" target="out"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="note" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;fontStyle=2;" value="每张表都带 status=1 过滤：禁用的角色/成员/权限点不参与计算。" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="820" x="30" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
